title: lithocarpus comptus
intro: Lithocarpus densiflorus, commonly known as the tanoak or lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Pacific coast of North America, from British Columbia, Canada to central California, USA. The tanoak has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of the tanoak include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus densiflorus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, such as fever, sore throats, and digestive problems.
